arts.ttl: Key Manchester United figures frustrated by missed £100m transfer opportunity
arts.sum: Some key figures at Manchester United are reportedly frustrated that they may well have missed out on banking as much as £100million for their former player Mason Greenwood in the future. arts.ttl: Racehorse of former Man United boss Sir Alex Ferguson to chase huge international prize fund
arts.sum: Spirit Dancer is set to make his return to action at Newmarket on October 12 before bidding to become the first dual winner of the Bahrain International Trophy

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag slammed by Premier League’s ‘worst ever manager’ in brutal rant
arts.sum: Frank de Boer has labelled Manchester United as being "wobbly" and "in a bad state" after watching their recent 3-0 Premier League thrashing at the hands of Spurs at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Chelsea fans FUME Jadon Sancho 'deserves' a place in England's squad while others back Lee Carsley's 'lovely' judgement after naming his second team for Nations League clashes
arts.sum: England fans reacted to Lee Carsley's second squad announcement with a mixture of reviews as Chelsea supporters fumed that Jadon Sancho wasn't selected, while others were impressed.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy’s four key qualities which could make him ideal to replace Erik ten Hag
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy has been backed to succeed Erik ten Hag as Manchester United manager by his fellow Dutchman Rene Meuelensteen, should the current boss be shown the door in the near future

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Marco Silva targeted as Man Utd's next manager
arts.sum: Football transfer news expert Duncan Castles has revealed on the Transfers Podcast, produced in conjunction with FootballTransfers, that the United are admirers of Fulham boss Silva, with the London club enjoying significant progress under the Portuguese boss. Castles said: "I think you have got to look at whether they go for someone who is experienced from inside the Premier League.

arts.ttl: LISTEN to It's All Kicking Off! Should Jhon Duran START against Manchester United or will Unai Emery rely on him to be his super sub?
arts.sum: Chris Sutton and Ian Ladyman gave their verdicts as they questioned whether Jhon Duran's Champions League heroics for Aston Villa have earned him a start against Man United.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag approves special Joshua Zirkzee Liverpool request before FC Porto vs Man United
arts.sum: Joshua Zirkzee made the trip to Anfield for Liverpool's Champions League clash with former club Bologna

arts.ttl: “That’s just the truth” – Erik ten Hag slammed for the one thing he’s never had at Man United
arts.sum: If there’s one thing that managers need from their players it’s total buy in to their methods, and Erik ten Hag doesn’t ever appear to have had that at Man United. arts.ttl: What Happened to Sadiq El Fitouri - Salford Player Phil Neville Told Man Utd to Sign
